# SwiftData Migration Inventory — tradeguruelectrical

**Last updated:** 2026-03-15
**Generated by:** `/inventory-get swiftdata-migration`
**Source scope:** All .swift files in ios/Tradeguruelectrical/, Package.swift, tests/

---

## Instructions

This document tracks everything needed to migrate TradeGuru from flat JSON persistence to SwiftData, plus what can be tested on Windows/WSL without Xcode.

### Status definitions
| Status | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| `active` | Referenced in 2+ files — in use |
| `unused` | Only in its own file — may be dead code |
| `pending` | Defined but not yet implemented |
| `delete` | Will be removed after migration |

## Inventory

### Models — Convert struct to @Model class

| # | Name | Path | Lines | Action | Relationships |
|---|------|------|-------|--------|---------------|
| 1 | Conversation | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Models/Conversation.swift` | 26 | struct → @Model class | messages: [ChatMessage] cascade |
| 2 | ChatMessage | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Models/ChatMessage.swift:8` | 31 | struct → @Model class | blocks: [ContentBlock], attachments: [MessageAttachment]? |
| 3 | MessageAttachment | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Models/ChatMessage.swift:33` | 20 | struct → @Model class, move to own file | none (leaf model) |
| 4 | ContentBlock | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Models/ContentBlock.swift:18` | 51 | struct → @Model class | items: [PartsItem]? |
| 5 | PartsItem | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Models/ContentBlock.swift:70` | 13 | struct → @Model class, move to own file | none (leaf model) |

**Migration order (bottom-up):** PartsItem → MessageAttachment → ContentBlock → ChatMessage → Conversation

### Enums — No Change Required

| # | Name | Path | Lines | Notes |
|---|------|------|-------|-------|
| 1 | MessageRole | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Models/ChatMessage.swift:3` | 6 | String raw value, Codable — SwiftData handles natively |
| 2 | AttachmentType | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Models/ChatMessage.swift:55` | 4 | String raw value, Codable |
| 3 | ContentBlockType | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Models/ContentBlock.swift:3` | 13 | String raw values with CodingKeys (stepList = "step_list") |
| 4 | ThinkingMode | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/ThinkingMode.swift` | 52 | Stored as property on Conversation and ChatMessage |

### ViewModel — Modify (remove ConversationStore calls)

| # | Name | Path | Lines | ConversationStore References |
|---|------|------|-------|------------------------------|
| 1 | ChatViewModel | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/ViewModels/ChatViewModel.swift` | 440 | Line 25: `.load()` in init, Lines 53/81/111/124/438: `.save()` calls (6 total) |

**Changes needed:**
- Add `import SwiftData`
- Accept `ModelContext` in init (or use `@Environment(\.modelContext)`)
- Replace `ConversationStore.load()` with `modelContext.fetch(FetchDescriptor<Conversation>(sortBy: [SortDescriptor(\.updatedAt, order: .reverse)]))`
- Remove all `ConversationStore.save(conversations)` calls — SwiftData auto-saves
- Add `modelContext.insert()` for new conversations
- Add `modelContext.delete()` for conversation deletion (new capability)

| # | Name | Path | Lines | Reason |
|---|------|------|-------|--------|
| 1 | DeviceManager | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Services/DeviceManager.swift` | 67 | Keychain storage — orthogonal to SwiftData |
| 2 | TradeGuruAPI | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Services/TradeGuruAPI.swift` | 249 | Network layer — no persistence |
| 3 | StreamParser | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Services/StreamParser.swift` | 103 | SSE parsing — emits transient data |

|---|------|------|-------|--------|
| 1 | ConversationStore | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Services/ConversationStore.swift` | 28 | Replaced entirely by SwiftData ModelContext |

### Relationships — New (pending)

| # | Parent | Child | Cardinality | Delete Rule | Notes |
|---|--------|-------|-------------|-------------|-------|
| 1 | Conversation | ChatMessage | 1-to-Many | .cascade | Deleting conversation deletes all messages |
| 2 | ChatMessage | ContentBlock | 1-to-Many | .cascade | Deleting message deletes all blocks |
| 3 | ChatMessage | MessageAttachment | 0-to-Many | .cascade | Optional, deleting message deletes attachments |
| 4 | ContentBlock | PartsItem | 0-to-Many | .cascade | Optional, deleting block deletes parts |

### Relationship Diagram

```
Conversation ──1:N──▶ ChatMessage ──1:N──▶ ContentBlock ──0:N──▶ PartsItem
                          │
                          └──0:N──▶ MessageAttachment
```

## Tests — What Can Run on Windows/WSL

### Feasible Tests (no Xcode required)

| # | Test | Category | What It Validates | Feasible on WSL |
|---|------|----------|-------------------|-----------------|
| 1 | Model JSON round-trip | unit | Current Codable structs serialize/deserialize correctly | YES — `swift test` |
| 2 | @Model compilation | unit | SwiftData models compile, relationships resolve | YES — `swift build` |
| 3 | MockData parsing | unit | All mock conversations deserialize without errors | YES — `swift test` |
| 4 | Enum raw value stability | unit | ContentBlockType CodingKeys map correctly (stepList ↔ step_list) | YES — `swift test` |
| 5 | Migration helper | unit | Old JSON format converts to SwiftData models | YES — `swift test` |
| 6 | FetchDescriptor sort/filter | unit | Query predicates compile, sort descriptors work | YES — `swift test` |

### Not Feasible on WSL

| # | Test | Reason | Alternative |
|---|------|--------|-------------|
| 1 | SwiftData persistence (insert/fetch/delete) | Requires iOS runtime | GitHub Actions CI with macOS runner |
| 2 | CloudKit sync | Requires iCloud entitlement + device | Physical device testing |
| 3 | View rendering with @Query | Requires SwiftUI preview runtime | HTML preview parity check |
| 4 | Data migration on first launch | Requires app lifecycle | TestFlight beta |

### Package.swift Changes for Testing

Current Package.swift has **no test target**. Add:

```swift
targets: [
    .target(name: "Tradeguruelectrical", dependencies: [], path: "Tradeguruelectrical"),
    .testTarget(
        name: "TradeguruelectricalTests",
        dependencies: ["Tradeguruelectrical"],
        path: "Tests"
    )
]
```

Then create `ios/Tests/` directory with test files. Run `cd ios && swift test`.

---

## Data Migration Plan (JSON → SwiftData)

**First launch after update must migrate existing conversations:**

| # | Step | Action |
|---|------|--------|
| 1 | Check | Look for `conversations.json` in DocumentDirectory |
| 2 | Read | Decode JSON using old Codable structs (keep a copy of old struct definitions in migration helper) |
| 3 | Insert | Create @Model instances and insert into ModelContext |
| 4 | Save | `try modelContext.save()` |
| 5 | Delete | Remove `conversations.json` file |
| 6 | Flag | Set `UserDefaults.standard.set(true, forKey: "swiftdata_migrated")` |
